visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a silver necklace, stands inside a brightly lit convenience store. She holds a packaged dessert with white and yellow branding towards the camera, smiling broadly with her eyes squinted. The background shows refrigerated shelves stocked with various packaged food items. (2) A second woman wearing a brown bucket hat and a white lace top stands outdoors at night in front of a storefront. She holds the same dessert package with both hands in front of her face, displaying a wide smile and expressive facial movements while speaking. Street lights and store signs are visible in the blurred background. (3) A close-up shot focuses on a pair of hands opening the plastic packaging. A clear tray containing four pieces of light-yellow sponge cake rolls with thick white cream filling is revealed on a gray table surface. The hands gently touch and lift one piece of the cake. (4) Both women are seated together in an indoor living room setting with soft domestic lighting. They each hold a piece of the mochi cake, taking bites and looking directly at the camera with exaggerated surprised and happy facial expressions. They use their hands to gesture towards the food, emphasizing its texture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 不用飛日本. [Slogan]: 好吃嗎?. [Slogan]: 超紅711麻糬蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 你看我找到了什麼. (2) [Variety]: 買到了最後一個. [Subtitle]: 買到了最後一個. (3) [Logo]: 7-ELEVEN. [Logo]: mochi. (4) [Variety]: 像麻糬一樣QQ的欸. [Subtitle]: 他蛋糕皮真的像麻糬一樣QQ的欸. [Subtitle]: 他有把麻糬的口感做出來. [Subtitle]: 但是必須說日本的還是再更Q一些. [Subtitle]: 只好飛進去了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing in alternating scenes and together at the end.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young adult females; one with long dark hair in a white top, the other often wearing a brown bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A convenience store interior with refrigerated food racks; an urban street at night with neon signs; a tidy indoor home living room with a shelf and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid, energetic prosody over a bouncy, medium-fast electronic BGM. The voice exhibits high emotional valence. (2) A rhythmic plastic rustling sound occurs, marking the transition. A second female voice joins with high arousal and a comedic tone. (3) A 'pop' sound effect triggers during the close-up of the hands, followed by the steady beat of the electronic music. (4) Both female voices overlap in a casual, conversational manner with occasional laughter and high-pitched exclamations. The background music maintains a constant tempo until a sharp percussive 'stinger' marks the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a food discovery of a popular dessert at a 7-Eleven convenience store and review its taste and texture for an audience interested in trendy food items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators specifically name the brand (7-11) and the product (mochi cake), showing the packaging clearly and giving a direct review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing with heavy text overlays and high-energy audio to maintain viewer engagement during a simple product review.
